languages.text: {n}Дрожащий старческий голос хрипит в истошной молитве:{/n} "Мо-молитва... не слова, молитва-а-а — деяния... праведных! Мои сандалии с-с-стерты, но-но-но я иду..." {n}По телу проходит спазм и его и так бессвязная речь превращается в пугающую какофонию звуков, в которых едва угадываются слова. Вдруг Триасомата вновь бьется головой о палубу и выдает еще порцию обрывистых фраз:{/n} "Ве...веду их, но сам потерян! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, молю, ответь... ответь... ответь..." {n}Спазм повторяется.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Дрожащий старческий голос хрипит в истошной молитве:{/n} "Мои сандалии стерты, но я иду... Молитва — это не слова, молитва — деяния праведных. Я веду их, но я сам потерян! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Бог-Император{/g}, молю, ответь... ответь... ответь..."
traits.speaker: Amalgam_Fresh

languages.text: {n}A quavering, decrepit voice wheezes a desperate plea:{/n} "Pr-prayer... is not words, praaayer is the deeds... of the righteous! My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Мои сандалии с-с-стерты, но-но-но я иду..." {n}По телу проходит спазм и его и так бессвязная речь превращается в пугающую какофонию звуков, в которых едва угадываются слова. {n}A quavering, decrepit voice wheezes a desperate prayer:{/n} "My sandals are worn to shreds, but still I walk... Prayer is not words, prayer is the deeds of the righteous. I lead them, but I myself am lost! God-Emperor, I pray, answer... answer... answer..."

languages.text: {n}震えるような老いさらばえた声が、必死の嘆願を絞り出す。{/n}「い、祈りとは言葉ではない、祈りとは正しき者の…行いだ！我が履物はぼろぼろにすり切れてもなお、なお、なお私は歩む…」{n}痙攣が彼の体を襲い、ただでさえ不明瞭な言葉は、もはや言語とは思えぬ恐ろしい不協和音と化す。突如、トリアソマタは再び甲板に頭を打ちつけ、途切れ途切れの文の寄せ集めを吐き出す。{/n}「私は彼らを導く、だが私自身が迷っているのだ！{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝陛下{/g}、祈ります、答えを…答えを…答えを…」{n}痙攣が繰り返される。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A quavering, decrepit voice wheezes a desperate plea:{/n} "Pr-prayer... is not words, praaayer is the deeds... of the righteous! My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely sounds like language. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}震えるように弱々しい声で、絶望的な祈りを吐き出す:{/n}「私の履物はボロボロだが、それでも私は歩く...祈りは言葉ではない、祈りは正義の行いである。私は彼らを導くが、私は自身は迷っている！神皇帝よ、祈る...祈る...祈る...」

{n}震えるような老いさらばえた声が、必死の嘆願を絞り出す。{/n}「い、祈りとは言葉ではない、祈りとは正しき者の…行いだ！我が履物はぼろぼろにすり切れてもなお、なお、なお私は歩む…」{n}痙攣が彼の体を襲い、ただでさえ不明瞭な言葉は、もはや言語とは思えぬ恐ろしい不協和音と化す。突如、トリアソマタは再び甲板に頭を打ちつけ、途切れ途切れの文の寄せ集めを吐き出す。{/n}「私は彼らを導く、だが私自身が迷っているのだ！{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神帝陛下{/g}、祈ります、答えを…答えを…答えを…」{n}痙攣が繰り返される。{/n}

languages.text: {n}一个颤抖而衰老的声音发出绝望的恳求：{/n}“祷——祷告……不是言语，祷告是正义者……的行动！我的凉鞋早已磨烂，可，可，可我依然在前行……”{n}他的身体剧烈抽搐，那本就支离破碎的言语化作一片骇人的杂音，几不成语。突然，三相体再次用头撞击甲板，迸出一串支离破碎的句子：{/n}“我指——指引他们，可自己却迷失了！{g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}神皇{/g}啊，我祷告，我恳请回应……回应……回应……”{n}抽搐再次发作。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A quavering, decrepit voice wheezes a desperate plea:{/n} "Pr-prayer... is not words, praaayer is the deeds... of the righteous! My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely resembles articulation. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Une voix âgée et chevrotante balbutie une supplique désespérée.{/n} « Les p-prières ne sont pas des mots... Les prièèères sont les actes... des vertueux ! Mes sandales s-sont en lambeaux, mais je, mais je, mais je continue à marcher... » {n}Un spasme secoue son corps, et son discours confus se transforme en une cacophonie effrayante, à peine articulée. Soudain, le Triasomata se frappe à nouveau la tête sur le pont et éructe une autre série de phrases décousues.{/n} « J-Je les dirige, mais je suis moi-même perdu ! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, je vous en prie, répondez... répondez... répondez... »{n}Il est de nouveau pris d'un spasme.{/n}

My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely resembles articulation. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Mes sandales s-sont en lambeaux, mais je, mais je, mais je continue à marcher... » {n}Un spasme secoue son corps, et son discours confus se transforme en une cacophonie effrayante, à peine articulée. Soudain, le Triasomata se frappe à nouveau la tête sur le pont et éructe une autre série de phrases décousues.{/n} « J-Je les dirige, mais je suis moi-même perdu ! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Empereur-Dieu{/g}, je vous en prie, répondez... répondez... répondez... »{n}Il est de nouveau pris d'un spasme.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Una voz decrépita y temblorosa jadea con un rezo desesperado:{/n} «La o... oración no son palabras, son los actooos... ¡de los justos! Mis sandalias están reducidas a jirones, mas aún camino...». {n}Un espasmo sacude su cuerpo, y sus frases, ya inconexas, se convierten en una cacofonía apenas comprensible. De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Lo... Los guío, ¡pero estoy perdido! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, te lo imploro... responde... responde... responde...». {n}Vuelve el espasmo.{/n}

My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely resembles articulation. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

De pronto, el triasómata empieza a darse cabezazos contra la cubierta y retoma su discurso disperso:{/n} «Lo... Los guío, ¡pero estoy perdido! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Dios Emperador{/g}, te lo imploro... responde... responde... responde...». {n}Vuelve el espasmo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Titreyen, yaşlı bir ses çaresizce yalvarıyor.{/n} "Du... Dua... Sözler değildir, du... Dua eylemlerdir... Haklıların eylemleri! Çarıklarım pa... Paramparça oldu ama, ama, ama hâlâ yürüyorum..." {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, artikülasyona zar zor benzeyen korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Onlara li... Liderlik ediyorum ama ben kendim kayboldum! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı-İmparator{/g}, yalvarıyorum... Cevap ver... Cevap ver... Cevap ver..." {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}A quavering, decrepit voice wheezes a desperate plea:{/n} "Pr-prayer... is not words, praaayer is the deeds... of the righteous! My sandals are w-worn to shreds, but, but, but still I walk..." {n}A spasm racks his body, and his already muddled speech turns into a frightening cacophony that barely resembles articulation. Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}

Paramparça oldu ama, ama, ama hâlâ yürüyorum..." {n}Vücudu spazm geçiriyor ve zaten bulanık olan konuşması, artikülasyona zar zor benzeyen korkutucu bir kakofoniye dönüşüyor. Aniden Üçyeköz, kafasını bir kez daha güverteye vuruyor ve yarım yamalak cümlelerden oluşan bir başka karışım daha püskürtüyor.{/n} "Onlara li... Liderlik ediyorum ama ben kendim kayboldum! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Tanrı-İmparator{/g}, yalvarıyorum... Cevap ver... Cevap ver... Cevap ver..." {n}Spazm tekrarlanıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eine zitternde, gebrechliche Stimme haucht eine verzweifelte Bitte:{/n} "G-gebete ... sind keine Worte, sondern die Taaaten ... der Rechtschaffenen! Meine Sandalen sind z-zerschunden, aber, aber, aber ich gehe noch ..." {n}Sein Körper wird von einem Krampf geschüttelt und seine ohnehin schon verwaschenen Worte verwandeln sich in eine verstörende Kakophonie ohne jede Artikulation. Plötzlich schlägt der Triasomata erneut seinen Kopf auf das Deck und speit eine weitere Sequenz abgehackter Sätze aus:{/n} "Ich füh-führe sie an, bin aber selbst verloren! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}Gottimperator{/g}, ich flehe dich an ... antworte mir ... antworte ... antworte ..." {n}Er wird erneut von einem Krampf geschüttelt.{/n}

Suddenly, the Triasomata pounds his head on the deck again and spews forth another medley of ragged sentences:{/n} "I lea-lead them, but I myself am lost! {g|Encyclopedia:EmperorGlossary}God-Emperor{/g}, I pray, answer... answer... answer..." {n}The spasm repeats.{/n}
